ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., IC, Transistor, Diode) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the component details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the component type details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "signal" TEXT /* Signal name (e.g., SCL, SCLK) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the specification (e.g., tSCYC, tSHW) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the specification (e.g., —, None) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the specification */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification (e.g., ns, None) */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test the specification */,
  "reference_document" TEXT /* Document that provides more details about the specification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the specification was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the documentation belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the documentation was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the document was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the documentation the version belongs to */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.1) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the workflow belongs to */,
  "workflow_state" TEXT /* Current state of the workflow (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the workflow was updated */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to the workflow task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the workflow task */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the workflow state was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workflow_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the notification belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., update, approval) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message for the notification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the notification was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, trend) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specifications_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the historical entry belongs to */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification the historical entry belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the historical entry was updated */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the specification */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the history entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specifications_history_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documentation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the historical entry belongs to */,
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the documentation the historical entry belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the historical entry was updated */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the documentation */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the history entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documentation_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documentation_history_documentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("documentation_id") REFERENCES documentation ("documentation_id")
)
